overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a forested valley at dusk and ascending a steep snowy mountain ridge. The clip transitions from a grassy woodland clearing with purple twilight skies to a high-altitude snow field as night falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing at mountain base during twilight

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through grassy forest clearing toward distant snow-capped mountains

entered.detail: Dense evergreen pine trees forming the left boundary of the clearing
Snow-covered mountain peak visible in the distance against purple sky
Twilight sky with purple and pink cloud formations
Open grass meadow with scattered wildflowers

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a wide forest clearing at dusk, with dense pine forests flanking both sides and a snow-capped mountain peak visible in the distance under a purple twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain slope with snow banks

events.description: character turns right onto mountain path and begins ascending

agents.ego_description: Geralt turning onto the mountain trail and beginning the uphill climb alongside snow-covered slopes

entered.detail: Snow-covered mountainside appearing on the right as the path ascends
Narrow dirt path winding up the mountain slope

segments.scene_description: The camera follows Geralt as he turns right onto a mountain trail, leaving the clearing behind. The path ascends between pine forest on the left and snow-covered slopes on the right, with the mountain peak drawing closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: alpine mountain trail with mixed snow and rock

events.description: exiting tree line into rocky alpine terrain with increasing snow coverage

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing steep rocky path with snow patches on either side, navigating the alpine terrain

entered.detail: Steep rocky cliff face with patches of snow on the right side of the path
Narrow gravel and stone trail becoming steeper and more rugged

segments.scene_description: Leaving the forest behind, Geralt enters a narrow alpine valley with sparse vegetation. The path becomes rocky and steep, flanked by snow-covered slopes and rocky cliffs as the light fades toward night.

events.description: ground surface transitions to deep snow coverage as altitude increases
slope angle increases significantly requiring slower careful climbing

agents.ego_description: Geralt carefully climbing the steep snow field toward the mountain summit, weapons visible on his back

entered.detail: Deep snow covering the entire ground surface of the mountain slope
Dark blue night sky replacing the purple dusk as darkness falls

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Geralt ascends a steep snow field under the dark night sky. The terrain is now fully covered in snow, with the mountain ridge looming ahead. The climb becomes more arduous as the slope steepens toward the summit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a lush forest clearing at dusk transforms into a desolate, snow-covered mountain peak under a night sky. It begins with Geralt walking through a wide woodland opening flanked by dense pines, with a distant snow-capped summit visible beneath a purple twilight. As he turns right onto a mountain trail, the camera follows his ascent where the greenery of the forest gradually gives way to steep, snow-covered slopes. The scene then shifts into a narrow alpine valley of rocky cliffs and sparse vegetation as the light fades, before finally opening onto a steep, frozen snow field. The climb becomes increasingly arduous as the terrain turns fully white and the camera pushes upward toward the looming mountain ridge under the darkness of night.
